title: Indian Rocket Salad
description: A refreshing salad with the peppery flavor of rocket and a squeeze of lemon, inspired by Indian cuisine.

ingredients.name: Bake
ingredients.notes: Assuming bake refers to a type of Indian flatbread, such as naan or roti

instructions: Rinse the rocket leaves and pat them dry with a paper towel.
Cut the baked flatbread into small pieces and toast them in a toaster or oven until crispy.
Squeeze the juice from one lemon over the rocket leaves and toss to combine.
Top the rocket with the toasted flatbread pieces and sprinkle with salt to taste.
Squeeze the juice from the second lemon over the salad and toss again to combine.
